title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions:
IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
